# bloodngold.com

HeyPashi's Battle Brothers community site.
Tools, mods, and resources for Battle Brothers players.


## Tools

Damage Calculator
https://bloodngold.com/damage-calculator
Simulate hits to kill across all enemy armor loadouts.
Pick weapon, enemy, skills, and perks.

Damage Calculation Spec
https://bloodngold.com/damage-spec
Full breakdown of how Battle Brothers calculates damage,
armor, injuries, and morale.


## Mods

Location Scouting
https://www.nexusmods.com/battlebrothers/mods/980
Battle Brothers mod that reveals location type before entering.


## About

Created by HeyPashi.
Battle Brothers content creator.

YouTube:  https://www.youtube.com/@HeyPashi
Twitch:   https://www.twitch.tv/heypashi
